product_overview: Gimronal is a gym management SaaS for staff and members, combining client administration, attendance tracking, payments, cash control, reporting, and member self-service in one app. It also includes a super-admin center for multi-tenant oversight.
core_goals: Access the gym management system and sign in with staff credentials
Manage client records and membership status
Register membership payments and generate receipts
Record cash register income and expenses
Manage membership plans, trainer availability, inventory, and operational reports
Let members view their active plan, schedules, and recent check-ins
Provide super-admin control over the SaaS tenant environment

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Introduces the platform and directs users to sign in.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Scroll through features and pricing sections -> Click through to the login page

features.name: User Login
features.description: Allows staff to sign in with email and password using Supabase Auth.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the dashboard after successful authentication
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See an error message for invalid credentials

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Shows a staff overview with operational metrics and quick actions.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View monthly revenue, attendance counts, active plans, and cash balance -> Use a quick action to start a common management task

features.name: Clients Management
features.description: Lets staff search, register, update, and remove gym clients.
user_flows: Navigate to /clientes -> Search for a client by name or document ID -> Review the filtered client list -> Open the new client flow -> Fill in the client registration form -> Save the new client and see it added to the list
Navigate to /clientes -> Search for a client by name or document ID -> Choose a client from the list -> Edit the client information -> Save the changes -> See the updated record in the list
Navigate to /clientes -> Search for a client by name or document ID -> Choose a client from the list -> Remove the client -> See the client disappear from the list

features.name: Check-in Attendance
features.description: Supports attendance registration through QR scanning or manual lookup.
user_flows: Navigate to /asistencia -> Allow camera access for QR scanning -> Scan a member QR code -> See the attendance check-in recorded
Navigate to /asistencia -> Type a client ID or name in the search field -> Select the correct member -> Register the check-in -> See the attendance entry confirmed

features.name: Payments Panel
features.description: Enables payment registration, receipt generation, and payment history review.
user_flows: Navigate to /pagos -> Start the payment registration flow -> Search and select a client -> Select the plan and payment method -> Enter the payment amount -> Submit the payment -> See the payment recorded and receipt available
Navigate to /pagos -> Open a recorded payment -> Download the receipt as PDF -> Save or share the receipt file

features.name: Cash Register (Caja)
features.description: Tracks cash inflows and outflows for the daily cash box.
user_flows: Navigate to /caja -> Start a cash entry registration -> Enter the description, category, payment method, and amount -> Submit the log -> See the new cash movement in the register
Navigate to /caja -> Start a cash exit registration -> Enter the description, category, payment method, and amount -> Submit the log -> See the new expense movement in the register

features.name: Gym Membership Plans
features.description: Manages membership plans with duration, pricing, and permissions.
user_flows: Navigate to /planes -> Review the existing plans list -> Open the plan creation flow -> Define the duration, cost, and permissions -> Save the plan -> See the new plan in the list

features.name: Trainers Management
features.description: Helps staff review trainer availability, schedule shifts, and inspect trainer details.
user_flows: Navigate to /entrenadores -> Review trainer availability and assigned shifts -> Open a trainer’s details -> View their schedule and status

features.name: Inventory Management
features.description: Tracks stock, supply sales, and low-stock warnings.
user_flows: Navigate to /inventario -> Review stock levels and low-stock warnings -> Open the supply sale flow -> Register an item movement -> See inventory quantities updated

features.name: Reports
features.description: Provides operational metrics and graphs for income, attendance, and plan distribution.
user_flows: Navigate to /reportes -> Review charts and summary metrics for income, attendance, and plan distribution -> Compare performance across reporting categories

features.name: Accounts Receivable / Mora
features.description: Tracks overdue balances and late payment reminders.
user_flows: Navigate to /mora -> Review overdue accounts and reminder status -> Open a client’s late payment record -> Inspect the pending balance and related plan information

features.name: General Settings
features.description: Lets staff configure the gym profile and general system settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /configuracion -> Review the gym profile and configuration options -> Update available general settings -> Save the changes -> See the updated configuration reflected

features.name: Members Portal
features.description: Gives gym members access to their membership status, class schedule, and check-in history.
user_flows: Navigate to /socios -> View the current active membership status and expiration date -> Review the class schedule and trainer shifts -> Check recent attendance history

features.name: SaaS Master Center
features.description: Provides super-admin control for managing the multi-tenant gym SaaS environment.
user_flows: Navigate to /saas -> Review master dashboard information and tenant-level control data -> Inspect the multi-tenant SaaS overview

routes.description: Landing Page of Gimronal Gym Management SaaS
User Login Page with Supabase Auth credentials
Gym Main Dashboard with metrics, quick actions and registration
Clients management module with filters, list, and registration forms
Check-in attendance tracking panel with QR scan or manual search
Payments registration, receipts generator, history and filters
Cash register management with logs of daily entries and exits
Gym membership plans management (duration, cost, permissions)
Trainers availability, scheduling shifts, and details
Stock inventory tracking, supply sales, and low stock warnings
Gym metrics reports, graphs (income, attendance, plans distribution)
Accounts receivable / late payment reminders tracking
General settings of the gym profile and configurations
Super-Admin SaaS Master Center dashboard for multi-tenant gym control
Member portal for gym clients to view their plan, classes, and check-ins

features.name: Landing Page
features.description: Landing page introducing Gimronal features and navigation links
user_interactions: Click Login button to navigate to /login
Scroll through features and pricing sections

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password using Supabase Auth
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Login button to submit credentials
See error message toast on invalid credentials

features.name: Main Dashboard
features.description: Admin panel displaying overview metrics (active plans, cash balance, attendance)
user_interactions: Click quick actions (e.g. register payment, register client)
View monthly revenue and check-in counts

features.name: Clients Management
features.description: Complete CRUD list of gym clients with membership status
user_interactions: Search client by name or doc ID
Click New Client button to open registration modal
Fill client registration form
Click edit/delete icons on a client row

features.name: Check-in Attendance
features.description: Attendance tracking with QR scanner or manual lookup
user_interactions: Allow browser camera access for QR scanning
Type client ID/name in search field for manual check-in
Click check-in button

features.name: Payments Panel
features.description: Record memberships payments and view history
user_interactions: Click register payment button
Search and select a client
Select plan and payment method
Fill payment amount and submit
Click PDF download icon to download receipt

features.name: Cash Register (Caja)
features.description: Record cash inflows and outflows and cash box balances
user_interactions: Click Register Entry or Register Exit buttons
Enter description, category, payment method, and amount
Submit register log

features.name: Members Portal
features.description: Client-facing panel showing their current plan, class schedules, and check-in history
user_interactions: View current active membership status and expiration date
View scheduling calendar of class times and trainer shifts
View list of recent check-ins
